summary: Small, well-scoped fix addressing three minor API issues. The custom content-type parser for empty JSON bodies is correctly scoped to the mint route plugin, the seed script now uses ADMIN role with upsert update clause, and POST /products already returned 201 (no change needed). All 85 API tests pass.
positives: Custom content-type parser is scoped to the mint route plugin, not globally — avoids side effects on other routes
Empty body handling is defensive: trims whitespace and falls back to empty object
Seed upsert includes update clause so existing records get corrected too, not just new ones
Lockfile changes are purely cosmetic (eslint plugin peer dep resolution formatting)
